title: The Southsiders
summary: The Southsiders is a 1932 Swedish comedy film directed by Weyler Hildebrand and starring Gideon Wahlberg, Dagmar Ebbesen and Björn Berglund. It is set on the southern side of Stockholm.
extract: The Southsiders (Swedish: Söderkåkar) is a 1932 Swedish comedy film directed by Weyler Hildebrand and starring Gideon Wahlberg, Dagmar Ebbesen and Björn Berglund. It is set on the southern side of Stockholm.
